critical_invariants: Virtio ring buffer protocol must follow virtio 1.0+ specification exactly
Descriptor format: addr (8 bytes), len (4 bytes), flags (2 bytes), next (2 bytes) - layout is fixed
Available ring index must only be incremented after descriptor is fully written
Used ring must be read with proper memory barriers (LFENCE after reading used->idx)
Virtio queue notify must happen after available ring update with SFENCE
MAC address storage and retrieval must remain consistent
Network buffer alignment must meet DMA requirements
known_opportunities: Zero-copy TX path: pass userland buffer directly to virtio descriptor instead of copying
Batch processing: submit multiple descriptors before single queue notify
RX buffer pre-allocation: keep a pool of pre-mapped receive buffers
Interrupt coalescing: use virtio USED_EVENT_IDX to reduce notification frequency
Checksum offload: leverage virtio-net CSUM feature flag
Mergeable receive buffers for jumbo frame support
NAPI-style polling under high packet load to avoid interrupt storms
